name: Hopkins House Tomato Rubaiat
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and flour together until the flour is well blended.
2. Add the half and half. Cook until smooth and thickened, stirring constantly.
3. Season with salt, pepper, garlic salt, and onion salt.
4. Add the peas.
5. Cut the tops off the tomatoes and hollow out each tomato.
6. Fill each tomato with the creamed pea mixture and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Heat in a 450°F oven until the tomatoes are heated through.
